name: @tank/google-calendar
description: Create, query, update, and manage Google Calendar events and availability. Covers event CRUD, free/busy queries, recurring events with RRULE, Google Meet conferencing, attendee management, multi-calendar operations, and incremental sync. Sources: Google Calendar API docs, RFC 5545 (iCalendar). Triggers: calendar, event, meeting, schedule, availability, free busy, recurring event, RRULE, Google Meet, attendee, reminder, timezone, booking, appointment, Google Calendar.
